meaning: of; ~'s (possessive particle); (used after an attribute); (used to form a nominal expression); (used at the end of a declarative sentence for emphasis); also pr. [dì] or [di] in poetry and songs
sentence: 他买的苹果很好吃。
sentence_pinyin: Tā mǎi de píngguǒ hěn hǎochī.
sentence_translation: The apples he bought are very delicious.

meaning: (completed action marker); (modal particle indicating change of state, situation now); (modal particle intensifying preceding clause)
sentence: 他今天买了三个苹果。
sentence_pinyin: Tā jīntiān mǎi le sān gè píngguǒ.
sentence_translation: He bought three apples today.

meaning: I; me; my
sentence: 我今天想去看电影，但我没时间。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ jīntiān xiǎng qù kàn diànyǐng, dàn wǒ méi shíjiān.
sentence_translation: I want to go see a movie today, but I don't have time.

meaning: to be (followed by substantives only); correct; right; true; (respectful acknowledgement of a command) very well; (adverb for emphatic assertion)
sentence: 他是我们班最好的学生。
sentence_pinyin: Tā shì wǒmen bān zuì hǎo de xuéshēng.
sentence_translation: He is the best student in our class.

meaning: you (Note: In Taiwan, 妳 is used to address females, but in mainland China, it is not commonly used. Instead, 你 is used to address both males and females.)
sentence: 你今天想去哪里玩呢？
sentence_pinyin: Nǐ jīntiān xiǎng qù nǎlǐ wán ne?
sentence_translation: Where do you want to go and have fun today?

meaning: to exist; to be alive; (of sb or sth) to be (located) at; (used before a verb to indicate an action in progress)
sentence: 他现在在办公室里工作。
sentence_pinyin: Tā xiànzài zài bàngōngshì lǐ gōngzuò.
sentence_translation: He is working in the office now.

meaning: no; not so; (bound form) not; un-
sentence: 他今天不想去超市买东西。
sentence_pinyin: Tā jīntiān bù xiǎng qù chāoshì mǎi dōngxi.
sentence_translation: He doesn't want to go to the supermarket to buy things today.

meaning: to have; there is; (bound form) having; with; -ful; -ed; -al (as in 意 intentional)
sentence: 他有一个很好的想法。
sentence_pinyin: Tā yǒu yī gè hěn hǎo de xiǎngfǎ.
sentence_translation: He has a very good idea.

meaning: he; him (used for either sex when the sex is unknown or unimportant); (used before sb's name for emphasis); (used as a meaningless mock object); (literary) other
sentence: 他今天又去超市买东西了。
sentence_pinyin: Tā jīntiān yòu qù chāoshì mǎi dōngxi le.
sentence_translation: He went to the supermarket to buy things again today.

meaning: (pronoun) this; these; (bound form) this; the (followed by a noun); (bound form) this; these (followed by a classifier) (in this sense, commonly pr. [zhèi], esp. in Beijing)
sentence: 这杯水很好喝，你要不要也来一杯？
sentence_pinyin: Zhè bēi shuǐ hěn hǎo hē, nǐ yào bú yào yě lái yī bēi?
sentence_translation: This glass of water is very tasty, would you like to have one too?

meaning: (after a suppositional clause) in that case; then; (after a clause of action) as soon as; immediately after; (same as 是) merely; nothing else but; simply; just; precisely; exactly; only; as little as; as much as; as many as; to approach; to move towards; to undertake; to engage in; (often followed by 着) taking advantage of; (of food) to go with; with regard to; concerning; (pattern: 就 ... 也 ...) even if ... still ...; (pattern: 不 ... 就 ...) if not ... then must be ...
sentence: 他一到，我们就开始工作。
sentence_pinyin: Tā yī dào, wǒmen jiù kāishǐ gōngzuò.
sentence_translation: As soon as he arrives, we will start working.

meaning: (classifier used before a noun that has no specific classifier); (bound form) individual
sentence: 这个苹果很好吃。
sentence_pinyin: Zhè ge píngguǒ hěn hǎochī.
sentence_translation: This apple is very delicious.

meaning: (joining two nouns) and; together with; with (Taiwan pr. [hàn]); (math.) sum; to make peace; (sports) to draw; to tie; (bound form) harmonious; (bound form) Japan; Japanese
sentence: 我和他明天一起去超市买东西。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ hé tā míngtiān yīqǐ qù chāoshì mǎi dōngxi.
sentence_translation: He and I will go to the supermarket together tomorrow to buy things.

meaning: person; people
sentence: 这里的人都很友好。
sentence_pinyin: Zhèlǐ de rén dōu hěn yǒuhǎo.
sentence_translation: The people here are all very friendly.

meaning: to speak; to talk; to say; to explain; to comment; to scold; to tell off; (bound form) theory; doctrine
sentence: 他跟我说，明天会来。
sentence_pinyin: Tā gēn wǒ shuō, míngtiān huì lái.
sentence_translation: He told me that he will come tomorrow.

meaning: we; us; ourselves; our
sentence: 我们今天一起去超市买了很多东西。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒmen jīntiān yīqǐ qù chāoshì mǎile hěnduō dōngxi.
sentence_translation: We went to the supermarket together today and bought a lot of things.

meaning: to want; to need; to ask for; will; shall; about to; need to; should; if (same as 是); (bound form) important
sentence: 明天我要去超市买水果。
sentence_pinyin: Míngtiān wǒ yào qù chāoshì mǎi shuǐguǒ.
sentence_translation: Tomorrow I want to go to the supermarket to buy fruit.

meaning: good; appropriate; proper; all right!; (before a verb) easy to; (before a verb) good to; (before an adjective for exclamatory effect) so; (verb complement indicating completion); (of two people) close; on intimate terms; (after a personal pronoun) hello
sentence: 这个苹果看起来很好，你想吃吗？
sentence_pinyin: Zhège píngguǒ kàn qǐlái hěn hǎo, nǐ xiǎng chī ma?
sentence_translation: This apple looks very good, do you want to eat it?

meaning: one; single; a (article); as soon as; entire; whole; all; throughout; "one" radical in Chinese characters (Kangxi radical 1); also pr. [yāo] for greater clarity when spelling out numbers digit by digit
sentence: 他一口气就喝了一瓶水。
sentence_pinyin: Tā yīkǒuqì jiù hēle yī píng shuǐ.
sentence_translation: He drank a whole bottle of water in one go.

meaning: can; to have the skill; to know how to; to be likely to; to be sure to; to meet; to get together; meeting; gathering; (suffix) union; group; association; (bound form) a moment (Taiwan pr. [huǐ])
sentence: 他明天会来，我也会去。
sentence_pinyin: Tā míngtiān huì lái, wǒ yě huì qù.
sentence_translation: He will come tomorrow, and I will go too.

meaning: (adverb) also; both ... and ... (before predicates only); (literary) particle having functions similar to 啊
sentence: 他今天买了很多水果，我也买了一些。
sentence_pinyin: Tā jīntiān mǎi le hěn duō shuǐguǒ, wǒ yě mǎi le yīxiē.
sentence_translation: He bought a lot of fruit today, and I also bought some.

meaning: all; both; entirely; (used for emphasis) even; already; (not) at all
sentence: 他们今天都去超市买东西了。
sentence_pinyin: Tāmen jīntiān dōu qù chāoshì mǎi dōngxi le.
sentence_translation: They all went to the supermarket to buy things today.

meaning: right; correct; towards; at; for; concerning; regarding; to treat (sb a certain way); to face; (bound form) opposite; facing; matching; to match together; to adjust; to fit; to suit; to answer; to reply; to add; to pour in (a fluid); to check; to compare; classifier: couple; pair
sentence: 他对这个问题的看法很对。
sentence_pinyin: Tā duì zhège wèntí de kànfǎ hěn duì.
sentence_translation: His view on this issue is very correct.

meaning: to reach; to arrive; to leave for; to go to; to (a place); until (a time); up to (a point); (verb complement indicating arriving at a place or reaching a point); considerate; thoughtful; thorough
sentence: 他今天要到我们这里来。
sentence_pinyin: Tā jīntiān yào dào wǒmen zhèlǐ lái.
sentence_translation: He is coming to our place today.

meaning: (bound form) up; upper; above; previous; first (of multiple parts); to climb; to get onto; to go up; to attend (class or university); (directional complement) up; (noun suffix) on; above
sentence: 他上个月去了北京。
sentence_pinyin: Tā shàng gè yuè qù le Běijīng.
sentence_translation: He went to Beijing last month.

meaning: to come; (used as a substitute for a more specific verb); hither (directional complement for motion toward the speaker, as in 回来); ever since (as in 自古以来); for the past (amount of time); (prefix) the coming ...; the next ... (as in 来世); (between two verbs) in order to; (after a round number) approximately; (used after 得 to indicate possibility, as in 谈得来, or after 不 to indicate impossibility, as in 吃不来)
sentence: 明天他会来这里和我们一起吃饭。
sentence_pinyin: Míngtiān tā huì lái zhèlǐ hé wǒmen yīqǐ chīfàn.
sentence_translation: He will come here tomorrow to have dinner with us.

meaning: (adverb of degree); quite; very; awfully
sentence: 今天的天气很好，很适合去公园散步。
sentence_pinyin: Jīntiān de tiānqì hěn hǎo, hěn shìhé qù gōngyuán sànbù.
sentence_translation: The weather is very nice today, very suitable for going to the park for a walk.

meaning: still; still in progress; still more; yet; even more; in addition; fairly; passably (good); as early as; even; also; else
sentence: 他昨天没来，今天还没来。
sentence_pinyin: Tā zuótiān méi lái, jīntiān hái méi lái.
sentence_translation: He didn't come yesterday, and he still hasn't come today.

meaning: to go; to go to (a place); (of a time etc) last; just passed; to send; to remove; to get rid of; to reduce; to be apart from in space or time; to die (euphemism); to play (a part); (when used either before or after a verb) to go in order to do sth; (after a verb of motion indicates movement away from the speaker); (used after certain verbs to indicate detachment or separation)
sentence: 我们明天去超市买东西吧。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒmen míngtiān qù chāoshì mǎi dōngxi ba.
sentence_translation: Let's go to the supermarket to buy things tomorrow.

meaning: she
sentence: 她今天很高兴，因为明天要去旅行。
sentence_pinyin: Tā jīntiān hěn gāoxìng, yīnwèi míngtiān yào qù lǚxíng.
sentence_translation: She is very happy today because she is going on a trip tomorrow.

meaning: aspect particle indicating action in progress or ongoing state
sentence: 他正看着窗外的风景。
sentence_pinyin: Tā zhèng kàn zhe chuāng wài de fēngjǐng.
sentence_translation: He is looking at the scenery outside the window.

meaning: to think (about); to think of; to devise; to think (that); to believe (that); to desire; to want (to); to miss (feel wistful about the absence of)
sentence: 我想明天去超市买点东西。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng míngtiān qù chāoshì mǎi diǎn dōngxi.
sentence_translation: I'm thinking of going to the supermarket to buy some things tomorrow.

meaning: to; for; for the benefit of; to give; to allow; to do sth (for sb); (grammatical equivalent of 被); (grammatical equivalent of 把); (sentence intensifier)
sentence: 他给我买了一本书。
sentence_pinyin: Tā gěi wǒ mǎi le yī běn shū.
sentence_translation: He bought a book for me.

meaning: haven't; hasn't; doesn't exist; to not have; to not be
sentence: 我没有时间去超市买东西。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ méiyǒu shíjiān qù chāoshì mǎi dōngxi.
sentence_translation: I don't have time to go to the supermarket to buy things.

meaning: can; to be able to; might possibly; ability; (physics) energy
sentence: 他能说三种语言，真的很厉害。
sentence_pinyin: Tā néng shuō sān zhǒng yǔyán, zhēn de hěn lìhai.
sentence_translation: He can speak three languages, which is really impressive.

meaning: interjection expressing doubt or requiring answer; Eh?; what?
sentence: 啊，今天天气真好！
sentence_pinyin: À, jīntiān tiānqì zhēn hǎo!
sentence_translation: Ah, the weather is really nice today!

meaning: (specifier) that; the; those (colloquial pr. [nèi]); (pronoun) that (referring to persons, things or situations); then (in that case)
sentence: 那本书很有趣，我想买一本。
sentence_pinyin: Nà běn shū hěn yǒuqù, wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī běn.
sentence_translation: That book is very interesting, I want to buy one.

meaning: they
sentence: 他们明天会去超市买水果。
sentence_pinyin: Tāmen míngtiān huì qù chāoshì mǎi shuǐguǒ.
sentence_translation: They will go to the supermarket to buy fruit tomorrow.

meaning: to see; to look at; to read; to watch; to visit; to call on; to consider; to regard as; to look after; to treat (a patient or illness); to depend on; to feel (that); (after a verb) to give it a try; to watch out for
sentence: 你看，那本书就在桌子上。
sentence_pinyin: Nǐ kàn, nà běn shū jiù zài zhuōzi shàng.
sentence_translation: Look, that book is right on the table.

meaning: to make; to produce; to write; to compose; to do; to engage in; to hold (a party etc); (of a person) to be (an intermediary, a good student etc); to become (husband and wife, friends etc); (of a thing) to serve as; to be used for; to assume (an air or manner)
sentence: 他今天想做一顿丰盛的晚餐。
sentence_pinyin: Tā jīntiān xiǎng zuò yī dùn fēngshèng de wǎncān.
sentence_translation: He wants to cook a sumptuous dinner today.

meaning: to yield; to permit; to let sb do sth; to have sb do sth; to make sb (feel sad etc); by (indicates the agent in a passive clause, like 被)
sentence: 他让我明天去他家玩。
sentence_pinyin: Tā ràng wǒ míngtiān qù tā jiā wán.
sentence_translation: He asked me to go to his house to play tomorrow.

meaning: what?; something; anything
sentence: 你今天想去哪里做什么呢？
sentence_pinyin: Nǐ jīntiān xiǎng qù nǎlǐ zuò shénme ne?
sentence_translation: Where do you want to go and what do you want to do today?

meaning: but; yet; however; still; merely; only; just
sentence: 我想买那本书，但今天没有时间。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi nà běn shū, dàn jīntiān méiyǒu shíjiān.
sentence_translation: I want to buy that book, but I don't have time today.

meaning: oneself; one's own
sentence: 他决定自己一个人去完成这个任务。
sentence_pinyin: Tā juédìng zìjǐ yīgè rén qù wánchéng zhège rènwù.
sentence_translation: He decided to go and complete this task by himself.

meaning: (modal particle indicating suggestion or surmise); ...right?; ...OK?; ...I presume.
sentence: 我们一起去喝杯咖啡吧。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒmen yīqǐ qù hē bēi kāfēi ba.
sentence_translation: Let's go have a cup of coffee together.

meaning: point; dot; drop; speck; o'clock; point (in space or time); to draw a dot; to check on a list; to choose; to order (food in a restaurant); to touch briefly; to hint; to light; to ignite; to pour a liquid drop by drop; (old) one fifth of a two-hour watch 更; dot stroke in Chinese characters; classifier for items
sentence: 我想点一个菜，但不知道点什么好。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng diǎn yī gè cài, dàn bù zhīdào diǎn shénme hǎo.
sentence_translation: I want to order a dish, but I don't know what to order.

meaning: structural particle: used after a verb (or adjective as main verb), linking it to following phrase indicating effect, degree, possibility etc
sentence: 他跑得很快，我们都追不上。
sentence_pinyin: Tā pǎo de hěn kuài, wǒmen dōu zhuī bù shàng.
sentence_translation: He runs very fast, and none of us can catch up.

meaning: can; may; possible; able to; not bad; pretty good
sentence: 你可以明天再来这里吗？
sentence_pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ míngtiān zài lái zhèlǐ ma?
sentence_translation: Can you come here again tomorrow?

meaning: as (in the capacity of); to take sth as; to act as; to serve as; to behave as; to become; to be; to do; by (in the passive voice)
sentence: 他为自己买了一个新书包。
sentence_pinyin: Tā wèi zìjǐ mǎi le yí gè xīn shūbāo.
sentence_translation: He bought a new schoolbag for himself.

meaning: to cross; to go over; to pass (time); to celebrate (a holiday); to live; to get along; excessively; too-
sentence: 他来过这里，但现在已经走了。
sentence_pinyin: Tā lái guò zhèlǐ, dàn xiànzài yǐjīng zǒu le.
sentence_translation: He has been here, but he has already left now.

meaning: (negative prefix for verbs) have not; not
sentence: 他没吃早饭，所以现在很没精神。
sentence_pinyin: Tā méi chī zǎofàn, suǒyǐ xiànzài hěn méi jīngshen.
sentence_translation: He didn't eat breakfast, so he's very listless now.

meaning: big; large; great; older (than another person); eldest (as in 姐); greatly; freely; fully; (dialect) father; (dialect) uncle (father's brother)
sentence: 这个苹果很大，但那个西瓜更大。
sentence_pinyin: Zhège píngguǒ hěn dà, dàn nàge xīguā gèng dà.
sentence_translation: This apple is big, but that watermelon is even bigger.

meaning: from; through; via; to follow; to obey; to engage in (an activity); never (in negative sentence); (Taiwan pr. [zòng]) retainer; assistant; auxiliary; subordinate; related by common paternal grandfather or earlier ancestor
sentence: 他从这里走到那里，用了十分钟。
sentence_pinyin: Tā cóng zhèlǐ zǒu dào nàlǐ, yòngle shí fēnzhōng.
sentence_translation: It took him ten minutes to walk from here to there.

meaning: down; downwards; below; lower; later; next (week etc); second (of two parts); to decline; to go down; to arrive at (a decision, conclusion etc); measure word to show the frequency of an action
sentence: 他下楼去买东西了。
sentence_pinyin: Tā xià lóu qù mǎi dōngxi le.
sentence_translation: He went downstairs to buy something.

meaning: within; among; in; middle; center; while (doing sth); during; (dialect) OK; all right
sentence: 这本书的内容很适中，不太难也不太简单。
sentence_pinyin: Zhè běn shū de nèiróng hěn shìzhōng, bú tài nán yě bú tài jiǎndān.
sentence_translation: The content of this book is very moderate, neither too difficult nor too simple.

meaning: li, ancient measure of length, approx. 500 m; neighborhood; ancient administrative unit of 25 families; (Tw) borough, administrative unit between the township 镇 and neighborhood 邻 levels
sentence: 超市里有很多新鲜的水果。
sentence_pinyin: Chāoshì lǐ yǒu hěnduō xīnxiān de shuǐguǒ.
sentence_translation: There are many fresh fruits in the supermarket.

meaning: really; truly; indeed; real; true; genuine
sentence: 这朵花真好看，颜色很鲜艳。
sentence_pinyin: Zhè duǒ huā zhēn hǎokàn, yánsè hěn xiānyàn.
sentence_translation: This flower is really beautiful, the color is very bright.

meaning: now; at present; at the moment; modern; current; nowadays
sentence: 现在，我想去超市买点东西。
sentence_pinyin: Xiànzài, wǒ xiǎng qù chāoshì mǎi diǎn dōngxi.
sentence_translation: Now, I want to go to the supermarket to buy some things.

meaning: grain; harvest (old); variant of 年
sentence: 今年是我来这里的第三年。
sentence_pinyin: Jīnnián shì wǒ lái zhèlǐ de dì sān nián.
sentence_translation: This year is my third year here.

meaning: to use; to employ; to have to; to eat or drink; expense or outlay; usefulness; hence; therefore
sentence: 你可以用我的笔来写作业。
sentence_pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ yòng wǒ de bǐ lái xiě zuòyè.
sentence_translation: You can use my pen to do your homework.

meaning: many; much; too many; in excess; (after a numeral) ... odd; how (to what extent) (Taiwan pr. [duó]); (bound form) multi-; poly-
sentence: 超市里今天的人比昨天多很多。
sentence_pinyin: Chāoshì lǐ jīntiān de rén bǐ zuótiān duō hěn duō.
sentence_translation: There are many more people in the supermarket today than yesterday.

meaning: two; both; some; a few; tael, unit of weight equal to 50 grams (modern) or 1⁄16 of a catty 斤 (old)
sentence: 我买了两本书，一本给自己，一本给朋友。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ mǎi le liǎng běn shū, yī běn gěi zìjǐ, yī běn gěi péngyou.
sentence_translation: I bought two books, one for myself and one for a friend.

meaning: class; rank; grade; equal to; same as; to wait for; to await; et cetera; and so on; et al. (and other authors); after; as soon as; once
sentence: 请在这里等我一下，我马上就回来。
sentence_pinyin: Qǐng zài zhèlǐ děng wǒ yīxià, wǒ mǎshàng jiù huílái.
sentence_translation: Please wait for me here for a moment, I'll be right back.

meaning: (question particle for "yes-no" questions)
sentence: 你明天还来吗？
sentence_pinyin: Nǐ míngtiān hái lái ma?
sentence_translation: Are you still coming tomorrow?

meaning: day; sky; heaven
sentence: 今天天气很好，我们一起去公园吧。
sentence_pinyin: Jīntiān tiānqì hěn hǎo, wǒmen yīqǐ qù gōngyuán ba.
sentence_translation: The weather is very nice today, let's go to the park together.

meaning: to go out; to come out; to occur; to produce; to go beyond; to rise; to put forth; to happen; (used after a verb to indicate an outward direction or a positive result); classifier for dramas, plays, operas etc
sentence: 他从房间里走了出来。
sentence_pinyin: Tā cóng fángjiān lǐ zǒu le chūlái.
sentence_translation: He walked out of the room.

meaning: already
sentence: 现在已经八点了，我们得快点出发。
sentence_pinyin: Xiànzài yǐjīng bā diǎn le, wǒmen děi kuài diǎn chūfā.
sentence_translation: It's already eight o'clock now, we need to leave quickly.

meaning: this kind of; so; this way; like this; such
sentence: 这样做可以吗？
sentence_pinyin: Zhèyàng zuò kěyǐ ma?
sentence_translation: Is it okay to do it this way?

meaning: highest; greatest; too (much); very; extremely
sentence: 今天的天气太好了，我们出去玩吧。
sentence_pinyin: Jīntiān de tiānqì tài hǎo le, wǒmen chūqù wán ba.
sentence_translation: The weather today is too good, let's go out and play.

meaning: most; the most; -est (superlative suffix)
sentence: 这是我最喜欢的一本书。
sentence_pinyin: Zhè shì wǒ zuì xǐhuan de yī běn shū.
sentence_translation: This is my favorite book.

meaning: if; in case; in the event that
sentence: 如果你明天有时间，我们就去看电影吧。
sentence_pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ míngtiān yǒu shíjiān, wǒmen jiù qù kàn diànyǐng ba.
sentence_translation: If you have time tomorrow, let's go watch a movie.

meaning: again; once more; re-; second; another; then (after sth, and not until then); no matter how ... (followed by an adjective or verb, and then (usually) 也 or 都 for emphasis)
sentence: 如果你明天还想吃，我们可以再去买。
sentence_pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ míngtiān hái xiǎng chī, wǒmen kěyǐ zài qù mǎi.
sentence_translation: If you still want to eat it tomorrow, we can go buy it again.

meaning: to leave; to part (from); (literary) to differentiate; to distinguish; (bound form) other; another; different; don't ...!; to fasten with a pin or clip; to stick in; to insert (in order to hinder movement); (noun suffix) category (e.g. 性别, 派别)

sentence_pinyin: Zhōngguó shì yī gè yǒu zhe yōujiǔ lìshǐ hé fēngfù wénhuà de guójiā.
sentence_translation: China is a country with a long history and rich culture.

meaning: the body; one's health; in person
sentence: 他感觉身体有些不舒服，所以决定去医院检查一下。
sentence_pinyin: Tā gǎnjué shēntǐ yǒuxiē bù shūfu, suǒyǐ juédìng qù yīyuàn jiǎnchá yīxià.
sentence_translation: He felt a bit unwell, so he decided to go to the hospital for a check-up.

meaning: inn; old-style hotel; (bound form) shop; store
sentence: 街角那家店的东西很不错，我经常去。
sentence_pinyin: Jiē jiǎo nà jiā diàn de dōngxi hěn búcuò, wǒ jīngcháng qù.
sentence_translation: The things in that shop on the street corner are very good; I go there often.

meaning: to serve; service
sentence: 这家餐厅的服务非常周到，让人感觉很舒服。
sentence_pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de fúwù fēicháng zhōudào, ràng rén gǎnjué hěn shūfu.

meaning: to think of; to call to mind; to anticipate
sentence: 我一想到明天要考试，就有点紧张。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ yī xiǎngdào míngtiān yào kǎoshì, jiù yǒudiǎn jǐnzhāng.

meaning: action; conduct; behavior; activity
sentence: 他的行为对大家产生了很大的影响。
sentence_pinyin: Tā de xíngwéi duì dàjiā chǎnshēng le hěn dà de yǐngxiǎng.

meaning: straight; erect; to stick out (a part of the body); to (physically) straighten up; to support; to withstand; outstanding; (coll.) quite; very; classifier for machine guns
sentence: 这个新手机用起来挺不错的。
sentence_pinyin: Zhège xīn shǒujī yòng qǐlái tǐng búcuò de.

meaning: as if; to seem like
sentence: 他看起来好像很累，但还是在努力工作。
sentence_pinyin: Tā kàn qǐlái hǎoxiàng hěn lèi, dàn háishì zài nǔlì gōngzuò.

meaning: to be able to; to subdue; to restrain; to overcome; gram; Tibetan unit of land area, about 6 ares
sentence: 这袋大米重五千克。
sentence_pinyin: Zhè dài dàmǐ zhòng wǔ qiān kè.

meaning: to wish; to want; ready; willing (to do sth)

sentence_pinyin: Tā yuànyì bāngzhù wǒ wánchéng zhège xiàngmù.

meaning: adornment; to adorn; dress; clothing; costume (of an actor in a play); to play a role; to pretend; to install; to fix; to wrap (sth in a bag); to load; to pack
sentence: 他正在把新买的书装进书包里。
sentence_pinyin: Tā zhèngzài bǎ xīn mǎi de shū zhuāng jìn shūbāo lǐ.

meaning: music

sentence_pinyin: Tā fēicháng xǐhuan tīng gǔdiǎn yīnyuè.

meaning: surname Yuan; the Yuan or Mongol dynasty (1279-1368)
sentence: 这本书的价格是五十元。
sentence_pinyin: Zhè běn shū de jiàgé shì wǔshí yuán.

meaning: (express) thanks; gratitude; grateful; thankful; thanks
sentence: 我非常感谢你的帮助。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ fēicháng gǎnxiè nǐ de bāngzhù.

meaning: where?; somewhere; anywhere; wherever; nowhere (negative answer to question); humble expression denying compliment; also written 哪里
sentence: 请问，最近的超市在哪里？
sentence_pinyin: Qǐngwèn, zuìjìn de chāoshì zài nǎlǐ?

meaning: seat; base; stand; (archaic) suffix used in a respectful form of address, e.g. 师座; classifier for buildings, mountains and similar immovable objects
sentence: 那座山很高，我们花了一小时才爬到山顶。

meaning: to cover; to wrap; to hold; to include; to take charge of; to contract (to or for); package; wrapper; container; bag; to hold or embrace; bundle; packet
sentence: 妈妈把一些水果和面包装进了我的书包。
sentence_pinyin: Māmā bǎ yīxiē shuǐguǒ hé miànbāo zhuāng jìnle wǒ de shūbāo.

meaning: that kind; that sort

sentence_pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ nàyàng zuò, kěnéng huì dài lái bù hǎo de jiéguǒ.

meaning: to go (in a direction); to; towards; (of a train) bound for; past; previous
sentence: 他每天往学校走，风雨无阻。
sentence_pinyin: Tā měitiān wǎng xuéxiào zǒu, fēngyǔ wú zǔ.

meaning: eye; small hole; crux (of a matter); classifier for big hollow things (wells, stoves, pots etc)
sentence: 他看了一眼，就认出那是他的朋友。
sentence_pinyin: Tā kàn le yì yǎn, jiù rèn chū nà shì tā de péngyou.

meaning: house with more than 1 story; storied building; floor
sentence: 我家住在学校旁边的那座楼里。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ jiā zhù zài xuéxiào pángbiān de nà zuò lóu lǐ.

meaning: to feel; to sense; to perceive
sentence: 听到这个消息，我感到非常开心。
sentence_pinyin: Tīng dào zhège xiāoxi, wǒ gǎndào fēicháng kāixīn.

meaning: photograph; picture

meaning: to stop; to halt; to park (a car)

meaning: there; that place

meaning: old practice

meaning: gas; air; smell; weather; to make angry; to annoy; to get angry; vital energy; qi
sentence: 他听到这个消息后，气得说不出话来。
sentence_pinyin: Tā tīng dào zhège xiāoxi hòu, qì de shuō bù chū huà lái.

meaning: television; TV

meaning: to fall; to collapse; to lie horizontally; to fail; to go bankrupt; to overthrow; to change (trains or buses); to move around; to resell at a profit

sentence_pinyin: Tā zǒulù bù xiǎoxīn, chàdiǎn shuāidǎo.

meaning: afternoon; p.m.
sentence: 今天下午我们一起去公园散步吧。

meaning: to go out

meaning: wine (esp. rice wine); liquor; spirits; alcoholic beverage
sentence: 他每天晚上都喜欢喝一杯酒。
sentence_pinyin: Tā měitiān wǎnshang dōu xǐhuan hē yì bēi jiǔ.

meaning: to learn; to study

sentence_pinyin: Wǒmen měitiān dōu yào nǔlì xuéxí xīn zhīshi.

meaning: original; former; originally; formerly; at first; so, actually, as it turns out

meaning: they (for inanimate objects)

meaning: red; popular; revolutionary; bonus
sentence: 她今天穿了一件很红的衣服。

meaning: to welcome; welcome

sentence_pinyin: Wǒmen rèliè huānyíng xīn tóngxué lái dào xuéxiào.

meaning: same; ordinary; so-so; common; general; generally; in general

meaning: teacher

sentence_pinyin: Lǎoshī zhèngzài jiàoshì lǐ gěi xuéshēngmen jiǎng yīgè yǒuqù de gùshì.

meaning: adorable; cute; lovely

meaning: six; 6

meaning: suffix of a noun of locality

meaning: to sing; to call loudly; to chant

meaning: university; college

meaning: eye

meaning: how; what kind

meaning: to receive; to accept; to collect; to put away; to restrain; to stop; in care of (used on address line after name)

meaning: they; them (for females)

meaning: at once; right away; immediately; on horseback (i.e. by military force)

meaning: this year

meaning: cell phone; mobile phone

meaning: to receive (praise, an education, punishment etc); to be ...ed (praised, educated, punished etc)

meaning: busy; hurriedly; to hurry; to rush

meaning: ten; 10

sentence_pinyin: Zhège bān yīgòng yǒu shí gè xuéshēng.

meaning: to pass; to go through; process; course

meaning: to see; to catch sight of

meaning: can only; obliged to do sth; to have no other choice

meaning: to hear
sentence: 听到这个消息，我感到非常开心。
sentence_pinyin: Tīng dào zhège xiāoxi, wǒ gǎndào fēicháng kāixīn.

meaning: daughter
sentence: 我的女儿非常可爱，她很喜欢唱歌。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ de nǚ'ér fēicháng kě'ài, tā hěn xǐhuan chànggē.

meaning: to speak; to say; to talk; to gossip; to tell stories; talk; word

sentence_pinyin: Tā shuōhuà de shēngyīn hěn qīng, dàn wǒ háishì tīng qīngchu le.

meaning: car; automobile; bus
sentence: 这辆汽车开起来非常快。
sentence_pinyin: Zhè liàng qìchē kāi qǐlái fēicháng kuài.

meaning: to cry; to weep

sentence_pinyin: Nàge háizi yīnwèi zhǎo bù dào māma, zài jiē shàng yīzhí kū.

meaning: to be afraid; to fear; to dread; to be unable to endure; perhaps

sentence_pinyin: Tā pà hēi, suǒyǐ wǎnshàng shuìjiào yīdìng yào kāi zhe dēng.

meaning: (coll.) father; dad

meaning: to leave; to part from; to be away from; (in giving distances) from; without (sth); independent of; one of the Eight Trigrams 卦, symbolizing fire; ☲

sentence_pinyin: Wǒ jiā lí gōngsī hěn yuǎn, měi tiān yào huā yī gè xiǎoshí zài lù shàng.

meaning: letter; symbol; character; word; courtesy or style name traditionally given to males aged 20 in dynastic China

meaning: pretty; beautiful

sentence: 墙上挂着一幅漂亮的画儿。
sentence_pinyin: Qiáng shàng guà zhe yī fú piàoliang de huàr.
sentence_translation: There is a beautiful painting hanging on the wall.

meaning: erhua variant of 面条
sentence: 妈妈做的面条儿特别好吃。
sentence_pinyin: Māma zuò de miàntiáor tèbié hǎochī.
sentence_translation: The noodles my mom makes are especially delicious.

meaning: erhua variant of 孩
sentence: 那个男孩儿正在公园里高兴地踢足球。
sentence_pinyin: Nàge nánháir zhèngzài gōngyuán lǐ gāoxìng de tī zúqiú.
sentence_translation: That boy is happily playing soccer in the park.

meaning: erhua variant of 下
sentence: 请等一下儿，我马上就来。
sentence_pinyin: Qǐng děng yīxiàr, wǒ mǎshàng jiù lái.
sentence_translation: Please wait a moment, I'll be right there.

meaning: somewhat; rather; some
sentence: 桌子上有一些新鲜的水果。
sentence_pinyin: Zhuōzi shàng yǒu yīxiē xīnxiān de shuǐguǒ.
sentence_translation: There are some fresh fruits on the table.

meaning: text message; SMS
sentence: 我收到一条朋友发来的短信。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ shōudào yī tiáo péngyou fā lái de duǎnxìn.
sentence_translation: I received a text message from a friend.

meaning: public transport vehicle; town bus
sentence: 我每天坐公交车去上班。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ měitiān zuò gōngjiāochē qù shàngbān.
sentence_translation: I take the bus to work every day.

meaning: seen
sentence: 我在北京见过他一次。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ zài Běijīng jiànguo tā yī cì.
sentence_translation: I met him once in Beijing.

meaning: erhua variant of 快点
sentence: 电影快开始了，我们快点儿走吧！
sentence_pinyin: Diànyǐng kuài kāishǐ le, wǒmen kuài diǎnr zǒu ba!
sentence_translation: The movie is about to start, let's hurry up and go!

meaning: at that time
sentence: 那时候，我们常常一起去图书馆看书。
sentence_pinyin: Nà shíhou, wǒmen chángcháng yīqǐ qù túshūguǎn kàn shū.
sentence_translation: At that time, we often went to the library together to read books.

meaning: very good
sentence: 这家新开的饭馆味道挺好，价格也合适。
sentence_pinyin: Zhè jiā xīn kāi de fànguǎn wèidào tǐng hǎo, jiàgé yě héshì.
sentence_translation: This newly opened restaurant tastes pretty good, and the price is also reasonable.

meaning: next week
sentence: 我们下周要去北京旅游，已经订好了机票。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒmen xiàzhōu yào qù Běijīng lǚyóu, yǐjīng dìnghǎo le jīpiào.
sentence_translation: We are going to travel to Beijing next week and have already booked the flight tickets.

meaning: Joke
sentence: 他讲的笑话儿让大家都笑了。
sentence_pinyin: Tā jiǎng de xiàohuà ràng dàjiā dōu xiào le.
sentence_translation: The joke he told made everyone laugh.

meaning: bank card; ATM card
sentence: 我的银行卡放在钱包里，这样比较安全。
sentence_pinyin: Wǒ de yínhángkǎ fàng zài qiánbāo lǐ, zhèyàng bǐjiào ānquán.
sentence_translation: My bank card is in my wallet, which is safer.

meaning: available
sentence: 如果你有空儿，我们可以一起去公园散步。
sentence_pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ yǒu kòngr, wǒmen kěyǐ yīqǐ qù gōngyuán sànbù.
sentence_translation: If you have free time, we can go for a walk in the park together.

meaning: a bit; a little
sentence: 这碗汤有一点儿咸，但味道还不错。
sentence_pinyin: Zhè wǎn tāng yǒu yīdiǎnr xián, dàn wèidào hái búcuò.
sentence_translation: This bowl of soup is a little salty, but the taste is still not bad.
